design_tokens.source_of_truth: docs/design/_shared/tokens.json (W3C Design Tokens Community Group format with full scales 50-900, semantic on_base/on_tint pairs, motion, elevation, breakpoint, size, z-index)
design_tokens.format_note: This handoff payload contains the schema-required flat shape per handoff-schema.md lines 99-104. The full source is W3C-compliant tokens.json with $value+$type structure. SCSS + CSS-vars are GENERATED — see _shared/README.md for the dual-emit contract.
design_tokens.scope: all-features (first authored for balance-comparison; reusable cross-feature)
design_tokens.color_mode: light_only_v1 (dark v1.1 deferred; tokens dark-mode-ready by aliasing surface.* and text.*)

component_specs.name: <balance-dashboard-page>
component_specs.accessibility: role='main'; aria-labelledby='balance-page-title'; one H1 per route; lang attribute on <html>
component_specs.banking_notes: Deterministic state machine; refresh emitter wired to BOTH pull-to-refresh + explicit refresh button (OPEN-D-008)

component_specs.name: <balance-page-header>
component_specs.accessibility: <h1> programmatic focus on route enter; aria-busy on refresh button; subtitle is i18n-keyed
component_specs.banking_notes: OPEN-D-011 resolved — subtitle reflects FRESHEST row balanceAsOf, never stalest

component_specs.name: <balance-refresh-button>
component_specs.accessibility: aria-label='รีเฟรชยอดเงิน' (i18n key balance-comparison.refresh.aria); icon aria-hidden; aria-busy while loading

component_specs.name: <balance-account-list>
component_specs.accessibility: role='list' (explicit); aria-label='รายการบัญชีของคุณ...'; aria-busy while loading; Angular @for track accountId
component_specs.banking_notes: Wrapper only; no own surface — rows carry their own

component_specs.name: <balance-account-row>

error_messages.null_balance_as_of: ไม่ทราบเวลาอัปเดต (i18n: balance-comparison.lastUpdated.unknown)

component_specs.accessibility: role='listitem'; composed aria-label per template 'บัญชีลำดับที่ {rank} จาก {totalCount}, {typeLabelTH}, ลงท้ายด้วย {last4}, ยอดเงิน {balanceSpoken} บาท, อัปเดตเมื่อ {relativeTimeTH}{, อาจไม่ใช่ยอดล่าสุด}'; tap target ≥ 72×375 px; focus ring 3px
component_specs.banking_notes: Tie-break visualization NONE (OPEN-D-006); rank badge NONE (OPEN-D-007); NEVER displays full account number or customerId; entire row is single tap target (no nested CTAs)

component_specs.name: <balance-account-type-icon>
component_specs.accessibility: aria-hidden='true' MANDATORY (Thai label carries semantic per BR-008); no <title>; no role='img'
component_specs.banking_notes: OPEN-D-002 LOCKED — Heroicons outline v2.x MIT; SAVINGS=banknotes, CURRENT=credit-card, FIXED_DEPOSIT=lock-closed

component_specs.name: <balance-staleness-badge>

error_messages.tooltip: ยอดอัปเดตล่าสุดเมื่อ {absoluteISO} (i18n: balance-comparison.stale.tooltip.aria)

component_specs.accessibility: Non-interactive text (visible to all); icon + Thai text + color = 3 channels; AAA contrast 8.05:1
component_specs.banking_notes: Color-independence honored; copy 'อาจไม่ใช่ยอดล่าสุด' (i18n: balance-comparison.stale.badge.label); driven by server-computed account.isStale

component_specs.name: <balance-staleness-banner>

error_messages.snapshot_title: ยอดเงินอาจไม่เป็นปัจจุบัน
error_messages.snapshot_body: ระบบใช้ข้อมูลล่าสุดที่บันทึกไว้ ลองรีเฟรชอีกครั้งในอีกสักครู่
error_messages.stale_title: ข้อมูลอาจค้างนาน
error_messages.stale_body: กรุณารีเฟรชเพื่อรับข้อมูลล่าสุด

component_specs.accessibility: role='status'; aria-live='polite' (announced once, no interrupt); aria-labelledby='staleness-banner-title'; dismiss button aria-label='ปิดข้อความ'
component_specs.banking_notes: OPEN-D-005 LOCKED — driven by server meta.freshness (per SA event-flows §3.1); non-alarming copy; dismissible per session

component_specs.name: <balance-empty-state>
component_specs.accessibility: role='status' (NOT 'alert' — informational); heading programmatic focus on transition; illustration alt i18n key
component_specs.banking_notes: OPEN-D-012 LOCKED — CTA is non-interactive <span aria-disabled='true'>, NOT <button disabled> (avoids confusing focus stop); subtitle copy explicitly cites OPEN-003 exclusion rule

component_specs.name: <balance-masked-account-label>
component_specs.accessibility: aria-label='ลงท้ายด้วย {last4}' (i18n: account.masked.endingWith)
component_specs.banking_notes: HARD RULE — only component permitted to render account-number-like content; dev-mode assertion on input format; AC-002-H3

component_specs.name: <balance-amount>

error_messages.null_aria: ไม่ทราบยอดเงิน

component_specs.accessibility: aria-label MUST be full spoken form e.g. '128,540 บาท 25 สตางค์' (AC-005-E2); when satang=0 drop suffix; ฿ symbol aria-hidden; NEVER digit-by-digit
component_specs.banking_notes: CRITICAL — tabular-nums non-negotiable; FE-dev wraps in stable Angular pipe 'balanceAmount' using Intl.NumberFormat('th-TH', {style:'currency',currency:'THB'}); Security C-2 honored — balance values appear ONLY in this component

component_specs.name: <balance-last-updated>

error_messages.unknown_label: ไม่ทราบเวลาอัปเดต (i18n: balance-comparison.lastUpdated.unknown)

component_specs.accessibility: aria-describedby points to tooltip; tooltip dismissable with Esc; persistent while focused
component_specs.banking_notes: OPEN-D-004 LOCKED — thresholds <30s/30s-60s/1m-59m/1h-23h/1d-6d/≥7d-absolute; derived from balanceAsOf NEVER updated_at (OPEN-002)

component_specs.name: <balance-skeleton-list> + <balance-skeleton-row>
props: rowCount: number = 3 (fixed — do NOT echo cached count: PII timing leak)
component_specs.accessibility: list role='list' + aria-busy='true'; each row aria-hidden='true'; SR announces 'กำลังโหลด' once
component_specs.banking_notes: OPEN-D-009 LOCKED — NO shimmer in v1 (static placeholder only); shape-matched to AccountRow (avoids CLS); keeps skeleton if load > 800ms (do not flicker to error)

component_specs.name: <balance-retry-soft-button>
component_specs.accessibility: <button type='button'>; visible focus ring 3px; aria-busy while loading
component_specs.banking_notes: Used inside StalenessBanner; outline style (not solid) — secondary action affordance

component_specs.name: <balance-primary-button>
component_specs.accessibility: <button type='button'>; aria-busy while loading; aria-disabled when disabled; visible focus ring
component_specs.banking_notes: BANKING HARD RULE — Double-submit prevention: when loading=true, click suppressed; parent MUST debounce next click 2s after loading→false

component_specs.name: <balance-error-state>

error_messages.title: เกิดข้อผิดพลาดในการโหลดข้อมูล (Security C-2: never include balance values, never include account numbers, never mention upstream service names)
error_messages.body: กรุณาลองใหม่อีกครั้ง หรือกลับมาภายในไม่กี่นาที
error_messages.correlation_label: รหัสอ้างอิง: {trace} (สำหรับติดต่อทีมงาน)

component_specs.accessibility: role='alert'; aria-live='assertive'; heading programmatic focus on entry; retry button aria-busy while retrying
component_specs.banking_notes: Security C-2 honored — generic copy only, NO PII, NO upstream service names, NO masked account numbers, NO balance values; 401 redirects to login (does NOT land here); 403 IDOR DOES route here but copy NEVER reveals cross-customer attempt (Security finding 5.3)

screen_specs.title: Balance Dashboard — default (3-5 accounts, all live)
screen_specs.banking_notes: Header NOT sticky (LO-FI commitment); pull-to-refresh AND explicit refresh button (OPEN-D-008); per-row aria-label composed per accessibility-final §3.1 template
screen_specs.tokens_used: color.surface.page, color.surface.card, color.text.primary, color.text.secondary, typography.heading_1, typography.body_strong, typography.body, typography.amount (tabular!), typography.caption, spacing.3, spacing.4, size.row_min, color.border.focus

screen_specs.title: Loading skeleton
screen_specs.loading_state: 3 skeleton rows; aria-busy on list; subtitle replaced by skeleton bar
screen_specs.error_state: If load > 800ms, KEEP skeleton (do not flicker)
screen_specs.banking_notes: NO shimmer in v1 (OPEN-D-009); shape-matched to AccountRow (avoid CLS); aria-busy carries semantic load

screen_specs.title: Empty — zero in-scope active accounts
screen_specs.empty_state: Centered column, max-width 320px; illustration + heading + subtitle + disabled CTA placeholder
screen_specs.banking_notes: OPEN-D-012 LOCKED — CTA is non-interactive aria-disabled span; subtitle explicitly cites OPEN-003 exclusion rule; role='status' (NOT alert); heading programmatic focus

screen_specs.title: Stale data — snapshot served + per-row stale variants
screen_specs.error_state: N/A — banner is a warning advisory not an error
screen_specs.banking_notes: OPEN-D-005 LOCKED — banner driven by server meta.freshness; per-row badge driven independently by account.isStale; banner dismissible per session; non-alarming copy ('อาจไม่เป็นปัจจุบัน' not 'ผิดพลาด')

screen_specs.title: Hard error — retry
screen_specs.error_state: Full-page error illustration + heading + body + retry button + correlationId footer
screen_specs.banking_notes: Security C-2 honored — generic copy, NO PII, NO upstream service names; correlationId is OTel trace ID (no PII); 401 redirects to login; 403 IDOR routes here but copy NEVER reveals attempt; role='alert'

screen_specs.title: Single account (N=1)
screen_specs.banking_notes: No visual rank chrome (OPEN-D-007); SR template drops 'ลำดับที่ 1 จาก 1' prefix; subtitle says '1 บัญชี' not '1 of 1'; OPEN-D-007 + LO-FI commitment

screen_specs.title: 10-account density
screen_specs.loading_state: Same skeleton (3 rows) — does NOT match dense count (no PII timing leak)
screen_specs.banking_notes: No virtualization in v1 (N≤10 safe); Angular @for track accountId; AC-005-H1 verified no horizontal scroll; AC-005-E1 verified 200% font reflow

handoff_notes.tech_lead: DESIGN PAYLOAD READY for OpenAPI + ADR phase. (1) Token source of truth: docs/design/_shared/tokens.json (W3C spec); component+screen specs reference tokens BY NAME ONLY — no inline hex. (2) Resolved OPEN-D-001..005 — see metadata.resolved_open_decisions. (3) API contract requirement: response must carry meta.freshness ('live'|'snapshot'|'stale') per SA event-flows §3.1 — this drives <balance-staleness-banner>. account.isStale (per BR-013) drives per-row badge independently. (4) Security C-2 honored at UI layer — confirm OpenAPI 5xx/4xx error response shape does NOT echo balance values or unmasked account numbers in error bodies. (5) Server-side rank field (ADR-004) is consumed for SR aria-label 'Account N of M' at first render. (6) Component i18n keys locked — see screen-specs §8 (32 keys total in balance-comparison.* namespace + reused account.* namespace from money-transfer). (7) AccountView TS type aligns with SA event-flows §2.1 cached payload shape — TL to confirm field-name parity (rank, accountId, maskedAccountNumber, accountType, balance, currency, balanceAsOf, isStale).
handoff_notes.frontend_dev: FE IMPLEMENTATION PLAYBOOK: (1) Token generation contract — dual-emit SCSS ($-variables) + CSS custom-properties (:root --var) from docs/design/_shared/tokens.json. Style Dictionary recommended. See _shared/README.md for the complete generation rules including alias resolution and reduced-motion media query. (2) Font import — Inter (rsms.me) primary, Sarabun (Google Fonts) Thai fallback, system stack as final fallback; preconnect + preload weights actually used. (3) Component anatomy — 14 Angular standalone components per component-specs.md; ALL reference tokens by var(--token-path) at consumption; NEVER inline hex. (4) <balance-amount> is CRITICAL — wrap in stable Angular pipe 'balanceAmount' using Intl.NumberFormat('th-TH', {style:'currency',currency:'THB'}); aria-label uses full spoken form '128,540 บาท 25 สตางค์' (NEVER digit-by-digit) per AC-005-E2. (5) Tabular-nums via font-feature-settings: 'tnum' 1, 'lnum' 1 (or font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums) on .balance-amount class — non-negotiable. (6) Reduced-motion via @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) in tokens.css swapping --motion-duration-* to 0ms. (7) i18n keys in balance-comparison.* namespace (32 keys total — see screen-specs §8); reuse account.* keys from money-transfer if present. (8) <balance-masked-account-label> is the ONLY component permitted to render account-number-like content; assert ^\*+\d{4}$ in dev mode. (9) Heroicons outline v2.x (MIT) — SAVINGS=banknotes, CURRENT=credit-card, FIXED_DEPOSIT=lock-closed (OPEN-D-002 locked). (10) Mobile-first 375px ONLY in v1; do NOT add tablet/desktop layouts (OPEN-D-013).
handoff_notes.qa: QA P2 CHECKLIST — see accessibility-final.md §10. Key items: Lighthouse mobile a11y ≥ 90 on demo staging URL (AC-005-H4); VoiceOver iOS + TalkBack Android announce per template §3.1; balance spoken as '128,540 บาท 25 สตางค์' NOT digit-by-digit (AC-005-E2); focus order matches §2 per screen; 200% font scale no clipping (AC-005-E1); reduced-motion suppresses fade/slide; pull-to-refresh + explicit button both work; tooltip Esc-dismissable.
handoff_notes.security: C-2 honored at UI layer — confirmed error/empty/loading copy contains NO balance values, NO unmasked account numbers, NO upstream service names. C-3 (JWT sub source-of-truth) is a backend concern; UI never receives customerId in any DOM/data attribute. 401 redirects to login (auth interceptor); 403 routes to generic ErrorState (never reveals cross-customer attempt). Masked account format ^\*+\d{4}$ enforced by <balance-masked-account-label> primitive.

accessibility_checklist: Color contrast ≥ 4.5:1 documented for ALL text pairs used (18 pairs total — see accessibility-final.md §1); AAA achieved on primary text (17.85:1), warning/danger states (8.05:1, 8.13:1), primary buttons (10.36:1)
Focus ring visible on every interactive element: 3px solid color.border.focus + 2px offset; ratio 10.36:1 on white, 9.96:1 on page bg, 9.92:1 on warning tint — all PASS WCAG 1.4.11
Focus order matches DOM order matches visual rank order (per accessibility-final.md §2) for all 7 screens
Touch targets ≥ 44×44 dp (size.tap_min); AccountRow ≥ 72×375 px (size.row_min); inter-target spacing ≥ 8px (spacing.2)

Reduced-motion contract — every transition/animation references var(--motion-duration-*); @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) globally swaps to 0ms; skeleton no shimmer; pull-spring suppressed; badge/banner instant

Screen-reader composed aria-label on every AccountRow per template 'บัญชีลำดับที่ {rank} จาก {total}, {type}, ลงท้ายด้วย {last4}, ยอดเงิน {balanceSpoken} บาท, อัปเดตเมื่อ {relativeTime}{, อาจไม่ใช่ยอดล่าสุด}' (AC-005-H2)
Balance figure aria-label uses full spoken form (NEVER digit-by-digit) per AC-005-E2 — '128,540 บาท 25 สตางค์'
StalenessBanner role='status' + aria-live='polite' — announces once on appearance, no focus interrupt
ErrorState role='alert' + aria-live='assertive' — interrupts politely; heading receives programmatic focus
EmptyState role='status' (NOT alert — informational); heading programmatic focus on transition
Decorative icons aria-hidden='true' (account-type-icon, ฿ symbol, illustrations carry alt instead)
Color-independence — every state uses icon + Thai text + color (3 channels); rank uses DOM position + SR announcement (NOT color)
375px no horizontal scroll verified at all 7 screens (AC-005-H1)
200% font scale reflow verified (AC-005-E1) — rows stack vertically when needed, nothing clipped
<html lang='th'> with i18n locale swap; 32 i18n keys in balance-comparison.* + reused account.* (locked per screen-specs §8)
One <h1> per route (PageHeader title); H2 for screen-level headings (empty, error); heading hierarchy preserved
Lighthouse mobile a11y ≥ 90 target — all inputs satisfied by HI-FI design (final score depends on FE implementation fidelity; verified in QA P2)

Disabled text (color.text.disabled at 2.86:1) intentionally below AA — used ONLY on non-actionable empty-state placeholder CTA; carries aria-disabled='true' for assistive tech (exempt per WCAG 1.4.3 informative content)
Tooltip dismissable with Esc; persistent while focused (LastUpdated absolute timestamp)
Pull-to-refresh gesture has keyboard-accessible mirror (explicit refresh button in PageHeader) — OPEN-D-008

metadata.notes: Designer Phase 2 HI-FI complete. Authors FIRST design foundation for the entire banking project — token source of truth at docs/design/_shared/tokens.json (W3C Design Tokens Community Group format); rationale + WCAG evidence at tokens-rationale.md; FE-dev playbook at _shared/README.md. Feature-specific HI-FI for balance-comparison at docs/design/balance-comparison/hifi/ (component-specs, screen-specs, accessibility-final). 14 Angular component specs; 7 screen specs (default, loading, empty, stale, error, single, dense). All 5 OPEN-D items resolved (001-005). Security C-2 honored at UI layer (no raw balance in error/loading/empty copy). All 4 mandatory token groups present in handoff payload schema (colors, typography, spacing, border_radius) PLUS extended groups (motion, elevation, breakpoint, size, z-index, border_width, font_family, font_weight) in tokens.json source. 18 contrast pairs documented with WCAG AA evidence (10 AAA, 5 AA, 3 intentional exemptions with aria fallback). Mobile-first 375px ONLY (v1); tablet/desktop deferred (OPEN-D-013). Light-only color mode (v1); structure dark-mode-ready via surface.* and text.* aliases.
resolved_open_decisions: OPEN-D-001 = Design token system authored FROM SCRATCH at docs/design/_shared/tokens.json (W3C Design Tokens Community Group format); full color scales (primary 50-900, neutral 0-900), 4 semantic families (success/danger/warning/info with on_base/on_tint), 9 typography composites including amount with tabular-nums, 9-step spacing scale (8px base), 6 border-radius tokens (named + scale), motion/elevation/breakpoint/size/z-index groups

OPEN-D-002 = Heroicons outline v2.x (MIT license) LOCKED; SAVINGS=banknotes, CURRENT=credit-card, FIXED_DEPOSIT=lock-closed; all icons aria-hidden='true' (visible Thai label carries semantic meaning per BR-008)

OPEN-D-003 = i18n micro-copy LOCKED — 32 keys in balance-comparison.* namespace + 4 reused account.* keys; Thai primary + English fallback per key; full map in screen-specs.md §8 covering page/list/lastUpdated/stale/empty/error/refresh

OPEN-D-004 = Relative-time thresholds LOCKED: <30s='อัปเดตล่าสุด' / 30s-60s='X วินาทีที่แล้ว' / 1m-59m='X นาทีที่แล้ว' / 1h-23h='X ชั่วโมงที่แล้ว' / 1d-6d='X วันที่แล้ว' / ≥7d=absolute 'DD MMM YYYY HH:mm น.' / null='ไม่ทราบเวลาอัปเดต'; 60s staleness threshold INDEPENDENT of these labels

OPEN-D-005 = Server meta.freshness signal LOCKED — JSON payload field meta.freshness: 'live' | 'snapshot' | 'stale' per SA event-flows §3.1; drives <balance-staleness-banner> global visibility; per-row account.isStale drives <balance-staleness-badge> independently
additionally_locked_decisions: OPEN-D-006 = NO tie-break visualization (invisible deterministic order; matches BA's AC-001-H2 customer-invisible contract)
OPEN-D-007 = NO visible rank badge (DOM position + SR 'Account N of M' carry rank; matches BA's 'compare at a glance' goal without competing with balance)
OPEN-D-008 = SHIP BOTH pull-to-refresh AND explicit refresh button (accessibility — pull is touch-only, button is keyboard-reachable)
OPEN-D-009 = Reduced-motion behavior: skeleton no shimmer (always static); pull-spring suppressed; badge instant; banner instant; spinner static-or-text 'กำลังโหลด…'
OPEN-D-010 = ALWAYS show currency code (forward-compat for multi-currency US-BC-004 v1.1)
OPEN-D-011 = Header subtitle reflects FRESHEST row balanceAsOf (never stalest — header should never be more pessimistic than rows)
OPEN-D-012 = Empty-state CTA is non-interactive <span aria-disabled='true'> placeholder (v1 — no real open-account flow; not <button disabled> which can confuse SR focus)
OPEN-D-013 = MOBILE-FIRST 375px ONLY in v1; tablet (768px) + desktop (1280px) tokens defined for v1.1 forward-compat
applied_security_conditions: C-2 — Audit event payload metadata-only (UI: error/loading/empty/skeleton copy contains NO balance values, NO masked or full account numbers, NO upstream service names like Redis/AccountClient/503)

C-3 — JWT sub source-of-truth (UI: customerId NEVER appears in DOM, data attributes, or visible content — entire UI is opaque to customerId; 403 IDOR routes to generic ErrorState that NEVER reveals cross-customer attempt — Security finding 5.3 at UI layer)
